race.description: Kia Southern Region Dealer Of The Year Hcp
race.comment: LA MORRA (8) kept fresh and back sharply in grade and trip. Faded quickly in the straight with a disappointing eleventh over 2400m in the G1 ATC Australian Oaks at Randwick. Well placed in this company and can return to form from the good gate. WOUNDER (9) handy mare who produced solid closing splits with a respectable sixth over 1550m at Canterbury second-up. Ticks a few boxes today and expected to go close. OSO SPIRITED (1) improving mare ready to win fourth-up. Sat on the good tempo with a gritty second over 1900m at Canterbury. Will take control again and prove hard to get past. TOTOKA (7) jumped slowly and never got into the contest with a poor tenth over 1800m at Hawkesbury in BM78 grade. Comes back a few levels with the 3kg claim. Sharp improver.
